title.zh: 中国电动自行车进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動自行車進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese e-bike GB standards (GB 17761-2018, GB/T 36972, GB 42295/42296) against Australian e-bike requirements: pedalec EN 15194 ≤250W classification, power-assisted pedal cycle ≤200W road-rule pathway, ACCC / Australian Consumer Law product safety obligations, RCM / electrical safety, AS/NZS evidence, and lithium battery transport documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动自行车GB标准（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）与澳大利亚电动自行车要求对比：符合EN 15194且≤250W的pedalec分类、≤200W助力脚踏车道路规则路径、ACCC/澳大利亚消费者法产品安全义务、RCM/电气安全、AS/NZS证据及锂电池运输文件。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動自行車GB標準（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）與澳洲電動自行車要求對比：符合EN 15194且≤250W的pedalec分類、≤200W助力腳踏車道路規則路徑、ACCC/澳洲消費者法產品安全義務、RCM/電氣安全、AS/NZS證據及鋰電池運輸文件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ACCC determination, state road-rule determination, RCM conformity assessment, customs classification, transport dangerous-goods approval, or market-access approval. Australian e-bike treatment depends on product design, motor power, pedal-assist mode, road-use jurisdiction, charger supply, battery chemistry, and importer role. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Commonwealth law, state and territory road rules, electrical safety rules, AS/NZS standards, and ACCC product safety expectations with qualified Australian legal and technical professionals before shipment or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ACCC裁定、州道路规则裁定、RCM合格评定、海关分类、运输危险品批准或市场准入批准。澳大利亚对电动自行车的处理取决于产品设计、电机功率、踏板助力模式、道路使用辖区、充电器供货方式、电池化学体系及进口商角色。出口商、进口商和分销商在出货或供应前，应与具备资质的澳大利亚法律及技术专业人士核验现行联邦法律、州和领地道路规则、电气安全规则、AS/NZS标准及ACCC产品安全期望。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ACCC裁定、州道路規則裁定、RCM合格評定、海關分類、運輸危險品批准或市場准入批准。澳洲對電動自行車的處理取決於產品設計、電機功率、踏板助力模式、道路使用轄區、充電器供貨方式、電池化學體系及進口商角色。出口商、進口商和分銷商在出貨或供應前，應與具備資質的澳洲法律及技術專業人士核驗現行聯邦法律、州和領地道路規則、電氣安全規則、AS/NZS標準及ACCC產品安全期望。

answer_first.en: For Australia, the critical China-to-AU gap is classification: a road-legal e-bike is generally either a pedalec complying with EN 15194 and ≤250W continuous rated power, or a power-assisted pedal cycle with auxiliary motor output ≤200W under state road rules. Chinese GB 17761 permits up to 400W, so 251-400W models commonly fall outside the bicycle pathway and may be treated as registrable motor vehicles; charger, battery, RCM/electrical safety, ACCC product safety, AS/NZS evidence, and UN 38.3 documents must be handled separately.
answer_first.zh: 进入澳大利亚的关键差距是分类：可按自行车道路使用的电动自行车通常为符合EN 15194且连续额定功率≤250W的pedalec，或按州道路规则电机辅助输出≤200W的助力脚踏车。中国GB 17761允许最高400W，因此251-400W车型通常超出自行车路径，可能被视为需登记的机动车；充电器、电池、RCM/电气安全、ACCC产品安全、AS/NZS证据和UN 38.3文件须另行处理。
answer_first.zht: 進入澳洲的關鍵差距是分類：可按自行車道路使用的電動自行車通常為符合EN 15194且連續額定功率≤250W的pedalec，或按州道路規則電機輔助輸出≤200W的助力腳踏車。中國GB 17761允許最高400W，因此251-400W車型通常超出自行車路徑，可能被視為需登記的機動車；充電器、電池、RCM/電氣安全、ACCC產品安全、AS/NZS證據和UN 38.3文件須另行處理。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, Australian government department, legislation register, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from accc.gov.au, infrastructure.gov.au, legislation.gov.au, eess.gov.au, acma.gov.au, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs, secondary summaries, and law firm blogs are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: What motor wattage defines an e-bike as a bicycle (not a motor vehicle) in Australia?
q.zh: 在澳大利亚，多少电机功率决定电动自行车是自行车而非机动车？
q.zht: 在澳大利亞，多少電機功率決定電動自行車是自行車而非機動車？

a.en: Australian state and territory road rules typically define a power-assisted pedal cycle (PAPC) as having a motor not exceeding 250 W continuous rated power, aligning with EN 15194. Chinese e-bikes with motors rated 251–400 W under GB 17761 will likely fall outside the PAPC definition and may require registration as a motor vehicle, depending on the state.
a.zh: 澳大利亚各州和地区道路规则通常将电助力自行车（PAPC）定义为电机持续额定功率不超过250 W，与EN 15194一致。依据GB 17761额定功率为251–400 W的中国电动车可能超出PAPC定义，视各州规定可能需要作为机动车登记注册。
a.zht: 澳大利亞各州和地區道路規則通常將電助力自行車（PAPC）定義為電機持續額定功率不超過250 W，與EN 15194一致。依據GB 17761額定功率為251–400 W的中國電動車可能超出PAPC定義，視各州規定可能需要作為機動車登記注冊。

q.en: Which safety standards apply to e-bikes sold in Australia?
q.zh: 在澳大利亚销售的电动自行车须符合哪些安全标准？
q.zht: 在澳大利亞銷售的電動自行車須符合哪些安全標準？

a.en: E-bikes sold in Australia must have the electrical system and battery compliant with RCM marking requirements under the EESS framework. The battery pack requires compliance with AS/NZS IEC 62133 and UN 38.3 transport testing. The charger must also carry RCM. Mechanical safety is assessed against AS/NZS 1927 or equivalent bicycle standards.
a.zh: 在澳大利亚销售的电动自行车，其电气系统和电池须符合EESS框架下的RCM标志要求。电池组须符合AS/NZS IEC 62133和UN 38.3运输测试要求。充电器亦须加贴RCM。机械安全依据AS/NZS 1927或等效自行车标准评估。
a.zht: 在澳大利亞銷售的電動自行車，其電氣系統和電池須符合EESS框架下的RCM標誌要求。電池組須符合AS/NZS IEC 62133和UN 38.3運輸測試要求。充電器亦須加貼RCM。機械安全依據AS/NZS 1927或等效自行車標準評估。
